Variables.Name: SubsurfaceProfile
Variables.Description: SubsurfaceProfile, for Screen Space Subsurface Scattering

Variables.Name: LightmassSettings
Variables.Description: The Lightmass settings for this object.

Variables.Name: TextureStreamingData
Variables.Description: Data used by the texture streaming to know how each texture is sampled by the material. Sorted by names for quick access.

Functions.Name: GetBaseMaterial
Functions.Description: Walks up parent chain and finds the base Material that this is an instance of. Just calls the virtual GetMaterial()

Functions.Name: GetPhysicalMaterial
Functions.Description: Return a pointer to the physical material used by this material instance.

Functions.Name: SetForceMipLevelsToBeResident
Functions.Description:
Force the streaming system to disregard the normal logic for the specified duration and
	  instead always load all mip-levels for all textures used by this material.

Params.Name: OverrideForceMiplevelsToBeResident
Params.Description: - Whether to use (true) or ignore (false) the bForceMiplevelsToBeResidentValue parameter.

Params.Name: bForceMiplevelsToBeResidentValue
Params.Description: - true forces all mips to stream in. false lets other factors decide what to do with the mips.

Params.Name: ForceDuration
Params.Description: - Number of seconds to keep all mip-levels in memory, disregarding the normal priority logic. Negative value turns it off.

Params.Name: CinematicTextureGroups
Params.Description: - Bitfield indicating texture groups that should use extra high-resolution mips
